title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Wabash National India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Wabash National India
jsonLd.description:
Wabash National India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Wabash National India:
Wabash National India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wabash National India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
